description: Regression: /reload rebuilt Lua while preserving the network connection, leaving GMCP disabled in the fresh VM because negotiation state was cached in Lua.

scenarios.name: GMCP remains active across reload
init_lua: if rune.session.get('gmcp-loaded') then rune.gmcp.subscribe('Room') else rune.session.set('gmcp-loaded', 'yes'); rune.gmcp.subscribe('Char') end

steps.note: the reloaded script updates the live subscription set
